'''chamotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yogee|yogee]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-m-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yogee|yogee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chamotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæmetheth|chæmetheth]] || [[word:chæmethej|chæmethej]] || [[word:chæmethesh|chæmethesh]] || [[word:chæmethe|chæmethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chamomothoth|chamomothoth]] || [[word:chamomothoj|chamomothoj]] || [[word:chamomothosh|chamomothosh]] || [[word:chamomotho|chamomotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chamothoth|chamothoth]] || [[word:chamothoj|chamothoj]] || [[word:chamothosh|chamothosh]] || [[word:chamotho|chamotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chamofthoth|chamofthoth]] || [[word:chamofthoj|chamofthoj]] || [[word:chamofthosh|chamofthosh]] || [[word:chamofthof|chamofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chamothotho|chamothotho]] || [[word:chamothojo|chamothojo]] || [[word:chamothosho|chamothosho]] || [[word:chamothoko|chamothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chamothoth|chamothoth]] || [[word:chamothoj|chamothoj]] || [[word:chamothosh|chamothosh]] || [[word:chamotho|chamotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chamothothol|chamothothol]] || [[word:chamothojol|chamothojol]] || [[word:chamothoshol|chamothoshol]] || [[word:chamothokol|chamothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chamothothotho|chamothothotho]] || [[word:chamothojojo|chamothojojo]] || [[word:chamothoshosho|chamothoshosho]] || [[word:chamothoko|chamothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chamothothon|chamothothon]] || [[word:chamothojon|chamothojon]] || [[word:chamothoshon|chamothoshon]] || [[word:chamothokon|chamothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chamothothoro|chamothothoro]] || [[word:chamothojoro|chamothojoro]] || [[word:chamothoshoro|chamothoshoro]] || [[word:chamothokoro|chamothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
